taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Test planning for mobile applications, Automated test script development, Appium, Detox, JavaScript
skill_match_scores: Test planning for mobile applications:0.5, Automated test script development:0.5, Appium:0.0, Detox:0.0, JavaScript:0.5
must_have_quals: Proficient in creating test plans, test cases, and test scenarios for mobile applications across iOS and Android platforms, Strong hands-on experience in developing and maintaining automated test scripts for mobile apps using relevant tools and frameworks (e.g., Appium, Detox), Hands-on experience with JavaScript and Java for automation tasks and test script development, Knowledge of React applications, Experience integrating automated tests into CI/CD pipelines and working collaboratively with DevOps teams, Solid understanding of mobile application frameworks, architectures, and technologies to effectively design and execute testing strategies, Ability to analyze logs, debug issues, and troubleshoot mobile app performance, compatibility, and functionality issues, Strong knowledge of QA methodologies, processes, and best practices, including Agile testing methodologies (e.g., Scrum, Kanban), Experience in creating and maintaining test documentation, defect tracking, and reporting using tools such as Jira, Zephyr, ReportPortal, TestRail, or Allure, Effective communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams including developers, product managers, designers, and QA teams
core_responsibilities: Proficient in creating test plans, test cases, and test scenarios for mobile applications across iOS and Android platforms, Strong hands-on experience in developing and maintaining automated test scripts for mobile apps using relevant tools and frameworks (e.g., Appium, Detox), Hands-on experience with JavaScript and Java for automation tasks and test script development, Knowledge of React applications, Experience integrating automated tests into CI/CD pipelines and working collaboratively with DevOps teams, Solid understanding of mobile application frameworks, architectures, and technologies to effectively design and execute testing strategies, Ability to analyze logs, debug issues, and troubleshoot mobile app performance, compatibility, and functionality issues, Strong knowledge of QA methodologies, processes, and best practices, including Agile testing methodologies (e.g., Scrum, Kanban), Experience in creating and maintaining test documentation, defect tracking, and reporting using tools such as Jira, Zephyr, ReportPortal, TestRail, or Allure, Effective communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams including developers, product managers, designers, and QA teams
job_summary: FIS is a leading provider of technology that powers the world’s economy, and they are seeking a Mobile/Web Quality Engineer to drive innovation and growth for their Digital Banking Solutions business. The role involves creating test plans and automated test scripts, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and contributing to the company's digital transformation journey.
